arts.ttl: Villarreal ‘thinking about’ making summer approach for Chelsea central midfielder
arts.sum: Cesare Casadei is attracting interest from two different countries, including Spain’s Villarreal. The La Liga side have hopes of signing the 21-year-old Chelsea midfielder. Since joining the Blues in 2022, the young Italian has struggled to break into the first team. arts.ttl: Alan Hansen given hero's welcome as Liverpool great returns to old club after health scare

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd hatch Davies plan; Liverpool plot Kounde bid
arts.sum: Manchester United are prepared to meet Alphonso Davies ' wage demands with a blank cheque as they hope to convince the Bayern Munich left-back to reject interest from Real Madrid in favour of a move to Old Trafford. Kyle Walker will be made available for transfer next summer, with Manchester City prepared to demand a fee of £15m in the face of interest from Saudi Arabia.

arts.ttl: Bid prepared: Club ready to pay €150m to beat Liverpool & Man United to superstar transfer
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are reportedly lining up a huge bid for the transfer of Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz, who is also said to be on the radar of top clubs such as Liverpool and Manchester United. arts.ttl: Cole Palmer told one thing he must do to match 'fantastic' Mohamed Salah ahead of Liverpool game
arts.sum: Cole Palmer is set to come up against Mohamed Salah this afternoon when Liverpool welcome Chelsea to Anfield

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Chelsea: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: The Premier League's standout fixture this weekend arrives at Anfield as league leaders Liverpool take on fourth-place Chelsea. This is a huge test, and while they shouldn't succumb to a blitz as they did on their previous Anfield outing, Chelsea are likely to lose for the first time in the Premier League since the opening weekend.

arts.ttl: 'I’ve been critical': Graeme Souness praises Enzo Maresca for one thing he's done with his Chelsea players
arts.sum: 'Maresca has bounced back from an uncertain start to the season.'
